Five routes · 2026

Choose your kind
of beautiful.

Slow mornings, local tables, and landscapes that stick. Every journey is capped so the group still feels like a conversation — not a bus tour.

01 / Mountains

Patagonia

Where earth touches sky — glaciers, wind, and nights that rewrite what quiet means.

08 daysFrom $2,940Host Amara

02 / Desert

Morocco

Silence in the sand — riads, spice markets, and firelit evenings under a cold desert sky.

06 daysFrom $1,820Host Imani

03 / Coast

Indonesia

Islands on your own time — tide pools, jungle walks, and long swims that erase the clock.

10 daysFrom $2,160Tide House

04 / Coast

Cyclades

Salt on your skin — whitewashed lanes, ferry hops, and dinners that stretch until the sea goes ink-blue.

07 daysFrom $2,390Host Leo

05 / Mountains

Dolomites

Above the ordinary — alpine trails, meadow lunches, and cabins that feel older than the wifi.

09 daysFrom $3,140Ridge Cabin

Not sure which route?
Tell us how you travel.
